commands.review_summary:
The branch restores /publish-plugin as a full publish form, adds package changelog preview backend/frontend work and tests, extracts publish helpers, redesigns the publish UI, and adjusts skill/soul stats display.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main redirects /publish-plugin to /plugins/publish and lacks package changelog preview wiring, while PR head restores the legacy route and still has stale-preview and previous-release-without-README fallback paths.

target.title: feat: overhaul publish-plugin page, fix package changelog generation, add tests
target.body:
## Summary

- **Publish-plugin UI/UX overhaul**: redesigned form layout with better validation hints, drag-and-drop dropzone improvements, inline file list with remove buttons, auto-prefill feedback, and post-publish navigation to `/plugins`.
- **Fix auto-changelog race condition**: in-flight server-generated changelogs no longer overwrite manual user edits; stale requests are invalidated when the README is removed or the user starts typing.
- **Fix backend changelog generation**: `generateChangelogPreview` action now uses package release history (not skill history) for README diff and file comparison, with package-specific labels and fallback text.
- **Extract & test helpers**: pure functions (`normalizeGitHubRepo`, `extractSourceRepo`, `PACKAGE_NAME_PATTERN`, etc.) moved to `src/lib/pluginPublish.ts` with 37 unit tests.
- **Comprehensive test coverage**: 4 backend changelog tests, 4 action-level tests, 10 integration tests including race-condition regression tests. All 142 test files / 1036 tests pass.
- **Cleanup**: removed unused `ChangelogLabels` type, fixed misleading test name, guarded changelog tests against `OPENAI_API_KEY` env leakage.

## Test plan

- [x] `bun run test` — 142 files, 1036 tests all pass
- [x] `src/lib/pluginPublish.test.ts` — 37 tests for extracted helpers (regex, GitHub URL normalization, source repo extraction)
- [x] `convex/lib/changelog.test.ts` — package changelog preview generation with mock storage and fallback paths
- [x] `convex/packages.public.test.ts` — action auth guard, argument sanitization, mock isolation (`mock.lastCall`)
- [x] `src/__tests__/packages-publish-route.test.tsx` — full publish flow, bundle metadata, prefill, auto-changelog overwrite prevention, stale request invalidation, file size blocking, navigation after publish


Made with [Cursor](https://cursor.com)
